messages.content: Tooth hurts. Bad. Need an emergency appointment ASAP.
I'm sorry to hear that you're in pain. May I have your name, please? Also, do you have a preferred date and time for the emergency appointment?
Thank you, Alex. What time today would be best for you, or should I schedule the earliest available appointment?
Earliest available. Just get me in.

I will check for the earliest available appointment today and book it for you. One moment, please.
Alex, your emergency appointment is scheduled for today at the earliest available time. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Thank you, Alex. Take care and we look forward to seeing you at your appointment. Goodbye.

rollout.transcript:
PATIENT: Tooth hurts. Bad. Need an emergency appointment ASAP.
RECEPTIONIST: I'm sorry to hear that you're in pain. May I have your name, please? Also, do you have a preferred date and time for the emergency appointment?
PATIENT: Alex Miller. Today. ASAP.
RECEPTIONIST: Thank you, Alex. What time today would be best for you, or should I schedule the earliest available appointment?
PATIENT: Earliest available. Just get me in.
RECEPTIONIST: I will check for the earliest available appointment today and book it for you. One moment, please.
Alex, your emergency appointment is scheduled for today at the earliest available time. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
PATIENT: No. That's all. Goodbye. [DONE]
RECEPTIONIST: Thank you, Alex. Take care and we look forward to seeing you at your appointment. Goodbye.

score.reasoning: The assistant was efficient and professional, but failed to collect the required procedure type slot.
